name: Staffbase
tagline: AI-native employee communications and engagement platform
description: Staffbase is an AI-native employee experience platform that helps HR teams improve internal communications, onboarding, and engagement at scale. Its AI capabilities support content creation, multi-language translation, personalization, sentiment analysis, and engagement analytics. Staffbase is designed to reach every employee—including frontline and deskless workers—through mobile apps, email, intranet, and digital signage.
